text.p: Happy new month! May God visit you with favour and mercy throughout the 'ember' months. How're you and how's studies and work. I know that you're extremely busy. We're just back from the Bible school and we're resuming on the 6th September. Please I just want to be sure that you got the proposals I sent. Thanks a lot.

Thanks for your encouragement. Prof. wrote me recently precisely 2nd Feb. when he acknowledged receipt of the things I sent him. I'm not really expecting his mail since there's nothing urgent to write me about. I believe God sir and I believe in your prayers too. About my article for the Handbook, unfortunately I lost some of my documents when my laptop was reformated recently. The data I had earlier collected for the work were lost. I'm just starting afresh meaning that I'm not likely to meet the March 1, deadline. We've also been very busy with exams etc. since January. Kindly bear with me. I'll send it as soon as I'm ready. I'm also geting data ready for the Journal article . I hope people are responding to the handbook project. God bless you. Greetings to your wife.
